description: Aggregate-only summary of the offline label-Q instrument used in the Tier 2 ML review. The underlying per-CH4Net-tile rows are a license-walled derivative (CH4Net is CC-BY-NC-ND 4.0; methods §9.1 forbids per-file manifests) and live git-ignored at data_dir/ml/review/ml_label_q_estimate.json. Only these distributional aggregates — the facts the Tier 2 findings actually cite — are committed.
method: For each usable positive chip, ΔΩ was inverted offline from the chip's own MBMP ΔR (reporting LUT v4, solar-geometry AMF, Sentinel-2A assumed) and Q estimated over the CH4Net label footprint at the nominal wind below. Order-of-magnitude only; the distributional statements are robust to the wind assumption. See docs/reviews/tier2-ml-protocol-findings.md §F3.

negative_delta_omega.note: label masks whose footprint integrates to strictly-negative ΔΩ in the rebuilt chips — net-negative column enhancement; internally contradictory labels (recovered-date error, reference contamination, or annotation noise).

floor_provenance: Tier 1 noise-chip floors (docs/reviews/tier1-quantification-findings.md §F1): median 6.3, best-arid 4.0, mean 13.9 t/h.

provenance.committed_scope: aggregates only — license wall (no per-tile keys)
